story.title: Bonsai 27B: A 27B-Class model that runs on a phone

draft:
I just learned about Bonsai 27B, a massive AI model that can run on a phone. 
This changes the game for mobile apps. 
Key benefits include reduced latency and improved security. 
How will this impact mobile app development? 
#AI #MachineLearning #MobileTech
